name: Rax Genesis
short_description: A visual album where sound shapes reality. Twenty-four movements paint abstract landscapes for you to wander, whether by foot or drifting on clouds. Your path, your pace, your interpretation.
detailed_description:
In the space between sound and sight, music takes physical form. Twenty-four sonic movements shape a world where abstract structures pierce the sky and crystalline formations emerge from endless horizons. This is not a game, but a reimagining of what an album can become when freed from traditional bounds.

Here, you exist as a solitary figure in a vast canvas. Walk slowly, letting each note resonate through your steps, or summon your nimbus to drift through the atmosphere above. The choice of how to experience these soundscapes remains yours alone. Some find solitude in the heights, others revelation in the hidden valleys below.

Time moves differently in these spaces. What begins as an hour of music expands into countless moments of discovery. The world unfolds in subtle revelations—each passageway and secret area offering new perspectives on familiar sounds. Your path through these sonic territories remains uniquely yours.
